conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 39)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 39. US strikes 50+ targets on Kharg Island; Israel launches wide-scale bridge/railway strikes. 8 PM ET deadline — binary inflection point. Iran rejects ceasefire, submits 10-point counter-proposal. Vance: 'military goals achieved.' IRGC threatens strikes 'outside the region.' WTI ~$115. ~$46.9B spent.

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
